title: ampacus grisea
intro: Ampacus grisea, also known as the False Unicorn Root, is a perennial plant native to North America. The roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ampacus grisea include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps and other female reproductive issues. Herbal preparations of Ampacus grisea include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support women's health and alleviate various health conditions.
